pages.text: The Beam Meter is a useful tool when constructing accelerator systems. It can read the contents of beam ports or beamlines by right clicking on them with it. It also calculates the focus loss for the beam and how many blocks that the beam can travel.

$(l)Note$(): the values shown when clicking on a beamline block are at the $(l)end$() of the beamline not the block you click on.$(br2)The beam meter can also read an Accelerator Beam Port's redstone setting and a Particle Chamber Beam Port's output setting with a shift click.
